title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 10.22.2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 01/11/2022
Decarbonization remains a difficult process for the shipping industry, with many uncertainties regarding the future fuel and emissions landscape. Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2022-11-01_BreakwaveDecarbOct22Report.pdf

October 2022
Thought of the
"All-hands-on-deck to support the transition to low-carbon shipping"
Month:
The Big Picture
Decarbonization remains a difficult process for the shipping industry, with many uncertainties
regarding the future fuel and emissions landscape. Clean fuel infrastructure and future fleet
composition are major unknowns.
